mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, password, email, role, name, phone, major, github, dept, avatar, create_time, status, is_member FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT user_id, username, password, email, role, name, phone, major, github, dept, avatar, create_time, status, is_member FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT user_id, username, password, email, role, name, phone, major, github, dept, avatar, create_time, status, is_member FROM user WHERE email = #{email} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT user_id, username, password, email, role, name, phone, major, github, dept, avatar, create_time, status, is_member FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE user SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, password, email, role, name, phone, major, github, dept, avatar, create_time, status, is_member FROM user WHERE is_deleted = 0

SELECT user_id, username, password, email, role, name, phone, major, github, dept, avatar, create_time, status, is_member FROM user WHERE (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR dept LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 20
